item_tooltip.dissolver_enhanced.crystal_: Wax baa maqan, anigu ma qaabayn karo...
emc.title: EMC: §6%s
wireless_open.fail: Ma jiro baloog kala diri ah oo laga helay raadiyaha %d block!
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.root.tit: Waad ku mahadsan tahay kala dirida
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.root.des: Isku day Dissolver Enhanced. Dhab ahaantii, mahadsanid.
advancements.story.place_dissolver.title: Dib u dhis dib u dhis
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: Baro wasakh Waxaa laga yaabaa in dhaqaaluhu waligiis soo kabsado.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.wo: Baro alwaax oo ogow in logu dhab ahaantii leeyahay qiimo lacageed.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ex: Baro shay meel ka baxsan magaca Minecraft.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.gr: Baro cawska. Tani farsamo ahaan xisaabin.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: Baro dhagax-dhagax Si kastaba ha ahaatee, tani weli waa maalgashi.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.st: Baro ul. Wall Street wuu daawanayaa
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ro: Baro hilib qudhunsan. Waxay leedahay qiimo, laakiin waa maxay qiimaha?
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.eg: Baro ukun Mustaqbalka inta badan waa qaab omelet ah.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.em: Baro emeralds Dadka tuulada ayaa jeclaan lahaa kelmad.
Hayso 1,000 EMC Wasaqgu wuxuu bilaabay inuu ku ixtiraamo.
Hayso 1,000,000 EMC Dhaqaaluhu hadda inta badan waa qurxinta.
Hayso 1,000,000,000 EMC Fadlan jooji sicir-bararka mustaqbalka dhagax-dhagaxa.
Hayso 1,000,000,000,000 EMC Halkaa marka ay marayso caalamka ayaa lagugu leeyahay isbedel.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ta: Baro 100 shay. Xusuustu waa kayd ururin habaysan.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ho: Baro 500 oo shay. Waxaa laga yaabaa inuu jiro nidaam halkan.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ev: Baro 1,000 shay. Buug-yaraha ayaa noqday badeecada.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: Baro midab kasta. Xaashida faafinta hadda waa xaflad.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.dr: Baro Ukunta Dragon-ka. Dhamaadka waa la soo koobay.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.orbi: Samee EMC Orb-kaaga ugu horreeya. Bangigu hadda waa wareegsan yahay.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.roun: Geli EMC Orb-ka dareeraha Orbku waxa uu dhameeyay waraaqihiisa.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.cond: Samee EMC Orb qiimihiisu yahay ugu yaraan 1,000 EMC. Si habboon u wareegsan.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.heav: Samee EMC Orb qiimihiisu yahay ugu yaraan 1,000,000 EMC. Fadlan jilbahaaga kor u qaad.
command.feedback.get.not_found: Waa la heli waayay ciyaaryahan leh magaca '%s'!
command.feedback.update.give: %s EMC ayaa la siiyay. Qiimaha cusub: §6
command.feedback.memory.fill: Alaabada oo dhan waa la kaydiyay!
command.feedback.memory.forget: Illowday dhammaan walxihii waligaa la kaydiyay!
